# Full Document Test

## Overview

This fixture verifies that the full HTML5 document wrapper works correctly.

The output should include:
- `<!DOCTYPE html>`
- `<html lang="en-GB">`
- `<head>` with `<meta charset="utf-8">` and `<title>`
- `<body>` wrapping the content

## Section Two

Paragraph with **bold**, *italic*, and `inline code`.

### Subsection

- Item one
- Item two
- Item three
